title: AgentReady: Battle-Test Your AI Agent Before You Ship
description: Your agent is only as good as what it knows. AgentReady stress-tests your knowledge base and agent harness with 800M+ real-world data points — and tells you exactly where it'll break. Ship with data, not vibes.

slides.title: AgentReady
slides.subtitle: Battle-test your agent. Ship with data, not vibes.
slides.author: Raj Navakoti

slides.title: The Problem
body: Everyone's building AI agents.
Nobody's testing if they actually know enough to work.
70% of enterprise AI projects fail — not because models are bad, but because the knowledge agents need doesn't exist in any document.
It's tribal. It's in people's heads. It's in configs nobody reads.
Your agent ships. Day one: hallucination.
slides.notes: Every team in this room has this problem. You built an agent, gave it some docs, crossed your fingers.

slides.title: The Solution
body: AgentReady doesn't test your LLM. It tests what YOU built on top of it.
Upload your knowledge base (docs, context, READMEs)
Upload your harness (skills, rules, system prompts, tools)
Tell us what your agent does
We simulate real-world battle scenarios and score its readiness.
slides.notes: It's not about the engine. It's about the fuel.

slides.title: Powered by Real Data
body: 800M+ data points from 17 public datasets across 8 domains:
Healthcare — 206K+ clinical exam questions (MedQA, MedMCQA)
IT Incidents — 24,918 real ServiceNow incidents (UCI)
Finance — 875K+ labeled transactions (ULB, IEEE-CIS)
Legal — 1,117 real contracts with expert annotations (CUAD)
Code — 2,294 real GitHub issues with verified fixes (SWE-bench)
Plus: Customer Support, Real Estate, E-commerce
slides.notes: We don't make up test scenarios. We use real-world data. That's what makes the blind spots real.

slides.title: Live Demo
body: → melodious-hotteok-80230a.netlify.app
Upload. Test. Score.
Let's battle-test an agent right now.
slides.notes: Switch to the live app and run a test with the SRE Incident preset.

slides.title: The Money
body: Every company deploying AI agents needs this.
Free: 3 battle tests/month (acquisition)
Pro ($49/mo): Unlimited tests, harness testing, history
Enterprise: CI/CD integration, private datasets, compliance reports, API access
TAM: $4.6B AI testing & monitoring market (growing 40% YoY)
slides.notes: Freemium SaaS. The more agents you build, the more you test.

slides.title: Why Us
body: Published research — arXiv:2603.14057 (Demand-Driven Context)
No competitor does this — Perplexity deep research confirmed the whitespace
800M+ real-world data points — not synthetic tests
Tests both knowledge AND harness — nobody else touches the harness layer
Already deployed. Already working. Built today.
slides.notes: We didn't just build an app. We published the methodology. That's the moat.
